# tplinkeasysmart_ports (Data Source)

Read per-port configuration and effective state.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "tplinkeasysmart_ports" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `ports` (Attributes List) Port inventory as reported by the switch web UI. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ports))

<a id="nestedatt--ports"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ports`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Administrative enable state for the port.
- `flow_control_actual` (Number) Effective flow-control enum reported by the device page model.
- `flow_control_config` (Number) Configured flow-control enum reported by the device page model.
- `id` (Number) Physical switch port number.
- `speed_actual` (Number) Effective speed and duplex enum reported by the device page model.
- `speed_config` (Number) Configured speed and duplex enum reported by the device page model.
- `trunk_member` (Boolean) Whether the device reports the port as a trunk member.
